description: Create, edit, and run Jupyter notebooks with Claude
long_description:
nteract brings Jupyter notebooks to Claude. Create notebooks, execute Python and Deno code, visualize data with matplotlib/plotly/seaborn, manage dependencies, and see rich outputs — all from your Claude conversation.

Features:
- Create and open .ipynb notebooks
- Execute code cells with inline output rendering
- Manage Python dependencies (add, remove, sync)
- Real-time presence — see Claude's cursor in the notebook app
- Works with the nteract desktop app for side-by-side editing
name: nteract-nightly

tools.description: Attach to a notebook. Pass path (.ipynb) or notebook_id (UUID) — not both.
tools.name: connect_notebook

tools.description: Create a notebook. Ephemeral by default; save_notebook(path) to persist.
tools.name: create_notebook

tools.description: Save notebook to disk. For notebooks created with create_notebook(), you must provide a path.
tools.name: save_notebook

tools.description: Open the notebook in the nteract app for the user. Headless: returns a structured no-display reason.
tools.name: show_notebook

tools.description: Release a notebook session's peer connection. Omit notebook_id to disconnect the active session.
tools.name: disconnect_notebook

tools.description: Create a cell anchored by after_cell_id; omit after_cell_id to append.
tools.name: create_cell

tools.description: Replace a cell's source or type, optionally executing it and returning execution_id/output summary.
tools.name: set_cell

tools.description: Move a cell anchored by after_cell_id; null/omitted after_cell_id means start.
tools.name: move_cell

tools.description: Execute a code cell and return execution_id, status, and compact output summary.
tools.name: execute_cell

tools.description: Execute all code cells in order.
tools.name: run_all_cells

tools.description: Get outputs and status (done/error/running/queued) for an execution_id.
tools.name: get_results

tools.description: Restart the kernel, clearing all state.
tools.name: restart_kernel

tools.description: Review or update notebook dependencies. Returns current deps, fingerprint, and trust state.
tools.name: manage_dependencies

tools.description: Replace literal text in a cell. Use context_before/context_after to disambiguate repeated matches.
tools.name: replace_match

tools.description: Replace a regex match in a cell (fancy-regex). Fails if 0 or >1 matches. Replacement is literal text.
tools.name: replace_regex
